entity.summary: Japan-based regulated centralized cryptocurrency exchange operated by BitTrade Inc., a company established in September 2016 and formerly branded as Huobi Japan.
entity.notes: The official company profile states that BitTrade Inc. was established in September 2016 and holds Japanese crypto-asset exchange registration Kanto Finance Bureau No. 00007. HEI uses a month-level establishment date because the exact day is not stated. Service history continued through Huobi Japan before the 2023 rebrand back to BitTrade.

events.title: BitTrade operating company established
events.description: The Japanese company now operating the BitTrade exchange was established in September 2016.
events.notes: The official profile establishes the month but not the exact day, so September 1 is used as a month-level placeholder. The record does not claim that customer trading began on this exact date.

events.title: Huobi Japan service rebranded as BitTrade
events.description: The Japanese exchange changed its customer-facing service name to BitTrade, followed by the operating company's legal name change in April 2023.
events.notes: The service name changed on February 15, 2023; the company name changed to BitTrade Inc. on April 21, 2023.

evidence.title: BitTrade official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current BitTrade identity and active exchange service.

evidence.title: CCXT reference for BitTrade
evidence.notes: Independent exchange-library adapter corroborates the BitTrade exchange identity.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for BitTrade
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the BitTrade and Huobi Japan service identity.

evidence.title: BitTrade company profile
evidence.notes: Official company profile states that BitTrade Inc. was established in September 2016 and lists its Japanese exchange registration.

evidence.title: BitTrade service name and logo change announcement
evidence.notes: Company-issued release states that the service name would change to BitTrade on February 15, 2023.

evidence.title: BitTrade corporate name change announcement
evidence.notes: Company-issued release states that the legal company name changed to BitTrade Inc. on April 21, 2023.
